result.finding: 8 environment variables configured across Dockerfile and docker-compose.yml. Application service uses 4 Spring Boot overrides plus 1 JVM tuning var. Oracle DB service uses 3 database credential variables. No .env file or .env.example present — credentials are hardcoded in docker-compose.yml.
evidence: docker-compose.yml photoalbum-java-app: SPRING_PROFILES_ACTIVE=docker, SPRING_DATASOURCE_URL, SPRING_DATASOURCE_USERNAME, SPRING_DATASOURCE_PASSWORD (hardcoded)
values: Total: 8 variables — categories: runtime (2), database (3), secrets (3)
